metadata.description: Name of the Log Analytics workspace where Microsoft Sentinel is deployed.

properties.displayName: RetailShield - Gift Card Fraud Pattern Detection
properties.description: Detects abnormal gift card issuance, reload, and redemption patterns at POS that are consistent with gift card fraud or money laundering. Analyses RetailShield_POS_CL for velocity and value anomalies. MITRE T1657.
properties.query:
// ============================================================
// RetailShield — Gift-Card / High-Velocity Refund Fraud
// MITRE ATT&CK : T1657 — Financial Theft
// Tactic       : Impact
// Severity     : High
// Frequency    : Every 5 minutes | Lookback: 30 minutes
// Author       : Tanvir Farhad — ShieldTech Ltd, London
// Reference    : Organised retail crime — gift card draining via stolen
//                activations and refund abuse across multiple store locations
// ============================================================

let LookbackPeriod        = 30m;
let GiftCardActivThresh   = 10;    // activations per terminal in window
let StructuringThreshold  = 200.0; // GBP — transactions just below this = structuring risk
let StructuringBand       = 20.0;  // GBP — tolerance band (180–200 = structured)
let MultiTerminalThresh   = 3;     // same card at N different terminals = suspicious
let DrainWindowMins       = 15;    // minutes — refund then re-activation window

// ── Step 1: High-velocity gift card activations at a single terminal ──────────
let HighVelocityActivations =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s == "GIFT_CARD_ACTIVATE"
    | where isnotempty(TerminalId_s)
    | summarize
        ActivationCount  = count(),
        UniqueCards      = dcount(GiftCardNumber_s),
        TotalValue       = sum(toreal(TransactionAmount_d)),
        OperatorIDs      = make_set(OperatorId_s, 5),
        EarliestTx       = min(TimeGenerated),
        LatestTx         = max(TimeGenerated)
        by TerminalId_s, StoreId_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | where ActivationCount >= GiftCardActivThresh
    | extend ThreatSignal = "HighVelocityGiftCardActivation";

// ── Step 2: Structured transactions — purchases just below reporting threshold ─
let StructuredPurchases =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s in ("GIFT_CARD_ACTIVATE", "GIFT_CARD_RELOAD")
    | extend TxAmount = toreal(TransactionAmount_d)
    | where TxAmount >= (StructuringThreshold - StructuringBand)
        and TxAmount < StructuringThreshold
    | summarize
        StructuredCount  = count(),
        TotalValue       = sum(TxAmount),
        UniqueCards      = dcount(GiftCardNumber_s),
        TerminalIDs      = make_set(TerminalId_s, 5),
        EarliestTx       = min(TimeGenerated),
        LatestTx         = max(TimeGenerated)
        by OperatorId_s, StoreId_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 5m)
    | where StructuredCount >= 3                         // multiple structured tx = pattern
    | extend ThreatSignal = "StructuredGiftCardPurchase";

// ── Step 3: Drain-and-reload — refund then re-activation of same card ─────────
let DrainAndReload =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s == "GIFT_CARD_REFUND"
    | where isnotempty(GiftCardNumber_s)
    | join kind=inner (
        RetailShield_POS_CL
        | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
        | where TransactionType_s == "GIFT_CARD_ACTIVATE"
        | project
            GiftCardNumber_s,
            ReactivateTime   = TimeGenerated,
            ReactivateStore  = StoreId_s,
            ReactivateTerm   = TerminalId_s
    ) on GiftCardNumber_s
    | where ReactivateTime > TimeGenerated
        and ReactivateTime < TimeGenerated + totimespan(strcat(tostring(DrainWindowMins), "m"))
    | extend ThreatSignal = "GiftCardDrainAndReload";

// ── Step 4: Same card used at multiple terminals in short window ──────────────
let MultiTerminalCard =
    RetailShield_POS_CL
    | where ingestion_time() > ago(LookbackPeriod)
    | where TransactionType_s in ("GIFT_CARD_REDEEM", "GIFT_CARD_BALANCE_CHECK")
    | where isnotempty(GiftCardNumber_s)
    | summarize
        TerminalCount   = dcount(TerminalId_s),
        StoreCount      = dcount(StoreId_s),
        TerminalList    = make_set(TerminalId_s, 10),
        TxCount         = count(),
        EarliestTx      = min(TimeGenerated),
        LatestTx        = max(TimeGenerated)
        by GiftCardNumber_s, bin(TimeGenerated, 10m)
    | where TerminalCount >= MultiTerminalThresh
    | extend ThreatSignal = "GiftCardMultiTerminalUse";

// ── Step 5: Union all signals ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
union
    (HighVelocityActivations
        | extend
            GiftCardNumber_s = "", OperatorId_s = tostring(OperatorIDs[0]),
            StructuredCount = ActivationCount, TerminalList = dynamic([]),
            TerminalCount = 1, StoreCount = 1,
            ReactivateStore = "", ReactivateTerm = ""),
    (StructuredPurchases
        | extend
            GiftCardNumber_s = "", ActivationCount = StructuredCount,
            UniqueCards = 0, TerminalList = dynamic([]),
            TerminalCount = 1, StoreCount = 1,
            ReactivateStore = "", ReactivateTerm = "",
            TerminalId_s = tostring(TerminalIDs[0])),
    (DrainAndReload
        | extend
            ActivationCount = 1, StructuredCount = 1,
            UniqueCards = 1, TotalValue = toreal(TransactionAmount_d),
            TerminalList = dynamic([]), TerminalCount = 1, StoreCount = 1,
            OperatorId_s = "", EarliestTx = TimeGenerated, LatestTx = ReactivateTime),
    (MultiTerminalCard
        | extend
            ActivationCount = TxCount, StructuredCount = TxCount,
            UniqueCards = 1, TotalValue = 0.0,
            OperatorId_s = "", TerminalId_s = "", StoreId_s = "",
            ReactivateStore = "", ReactivateTerm = "")
| extend
    AlertSeverity   = "High",
    MitreTechnique  = "T1657",
    MitreTactic     = "Impact",
    PlaybookTrigger = "notify_soc",
    RiskScore       = 85
| project
    Timestamp        = coalesce(EarliestTx, TimeGenerated),
    GiftCardNumber_s,
    OperatorId_s,
    StoreId_s,
    TerminalId_s,
    ThreatSignal,
    ActivationCount,
    UniqueCards,
    TotalValue,
    TerminalCount,
    TerminalList,
    AlertSeverity,
    MitreTechnique,
    MitreTactic,
    PlaybookTrigger,
    RiskScore
| order by Timestamp desc
